descriptions.ja: 周波数制御パラメータ設定

note.ja: 周波数制御モードと周波数制御情報は指令制御、自端制御の何れかおよび、EM目標値制御の搭載を必須とする。
note.en: Frequency regulation mode in "Frequency regulation parameter setting" property and "Information of frequency regulation" property are required to install "EM target value control" and either "command control" or "autonomous control".

descriptions.ja: 指令制御パラメータ設定

note.ja: 指令制御機能を有する機器は搭載を必須とする。
note.en: Devices with command control functions are mandatory.

descriptions.ja: 自端制御パラメータ設定1
自端制御電力上限値(順方向)(W)
descriptions.en: Power upper limit for autonomous control. (Normal direction) (W)

descriptions.ja: 自端制御電力上限値(逆方向)(W)
descriptions.en: Power upper limit for autonomous control. (Reverse direction) (W)

note.ja: 自端制御機能を有する機器は搭載を必須とする
note.en: Devices with autonomous control functions are mandatory.

descriptions.ja: 自端制御パラメータ設定2
レートリミッタ(順方向)(W/sec)
レートリミッタ(逆方向)(W/sec)
自端制御パラメータ設定3

descriptions.en: Upper limit of dead band width. (mHz)
Lower limit of dead band width. (mHz)
Upper limit of power change rate. (W/mHz)
Lower limit of power change rate. (W/mHz)
Upper limit of power change speed. (W/sec)
Lower limit of power change speed. (W/sec)

note.ja: 自端制御機能を有する機器は搭載を必須とする。
note.en: Devices with autonomous control functions are mandatory.

descriptions.ja: 周波数調整サービスへの参加可否
descriptions.en: Possibility to participate in the frequency regulation service.

note.ja: 周波数制御モードと周波数制御情報は指令制御、自端制御の何れかおよび、EM 目標値制御の搭載を必須とする。
note.en: Frequency regulation mode and frequency regulation state must be either command control or autonomous control, and EM target value control must be installed.

descriptions.ja: 制御続行可否詳細情報
descriptions.en: Detailed information of whether the device can continue to control

note.ja: 上位バイトは制御続行の可否状態を示し、下位バイトは制御制限や継続不可の詳細情報を示す。APPENDIXの「制御続行可否詳細情報プロパティ」詳細説明参照
note.en: The upper byte indicates whether control can be continued or not. The lower byte indicates detailed information on control restrictions and continuation impossibility. Refer to "(18) Detailed information of whether the device can continue to control" in APPENDIX.

descriptions.en: Charge start time in the HH:MM format.
Charge end time in the HH:MM format.
Discharge start time in the HH:MM format.
Discharge end time in the HH:MM format.

descriptions.ja: ピークカット電力閾値(W)
ピークカット電力量閾値(Wh)

descriptions.en: Existence of PV reverse power flow.

descriptions.ja: 機器点瞬時電力計測値(W)
descriptions.en: Instantaneous power measurement value at device point. (W)

descriptions.ja: 受電点瞬時電力計測値(W)
descriptions.en: Instantaneous power measurement value at power receiving point. (W)

note.ja: 受電点を制御ポイントとできる機器は、受電点瞬時電力計測値(W)の搭載を必須とし、無効値を許容しない。
note.en: Devices that can use the power receiving point as a control point must implement the instantaneous power measurement value (W) at the power receiving point, and invalid are not allowed.

note.ja: 当該する制御を行っていない場合は無効値とする。
note.en: If the relevant control is not performed, the value is invalid.

descriptions.ja: 瞬時入出力可能電力値
descriptions.en: Instantaneous input and output power capability value

descriptions.ja: 瞬時充放電可能電力値
descriptions.en: Instantaneous chargeable and dischargeable power values

note.ja: 充電可能電力量(Wh) 、放電可能電力量(Wh) の搭載を必須とする。また、蓄電残量(DC Wh) と蓄電残量(%) の何れかの搭載を必須とする。なお、非搭載の値は無効値とする。
note.en: It is mandatory to implement chargeable power (Wh) and dischargeable power (Wh). In addition, it is mandatory to implement either the remaining stored electricity (DC Wh) or the state of charge (%). And non-implemented values should be treated as invalid values.

descriptions.ja: 積算入力電力量計測値(機器点順方向 Wh)
descriptions.en: Measured cumulative amount of input electric energy for PCS. (Normal direction at device point) (Wh)

descriptions.ja: 積算出力電力量計測値(機器点逆方向 Wh)
descriptions.en: Measured cumulative amount of output electric energy by PCS. (Reverse direction at device point) (Wh)

descriptions.ja: 積算系統買電電力量計測値(Wh)
descriptions.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy bought from grid. (Wh)

descriptions.ja: 積算系統売電電力量計測値(Wh)
descriptions.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy sold for grid. (Wh)
Measured cumulative amount of load electric energy. (Wh)

descriptions.ja: 積算太陽光発電電力量計測値(DC Wh)
descriptions.en: Measured cumulative amount of electric energy by PV. (DC value) (Wh)

descriptions.ja: 積算充電電力量計測値(DC Wh)
descriptions.en: Measured cumulative amount of charge electric energy to battery. (DC value) (Wh)

descriptions.ja: 積算放電電力量計測値(DC Wh)
descriptions.en: Measured cumulative amount of discharge electric energy from battery. (DC value) (Wh)

note.ja: 積算入力電力量計測値（機器点順方向 Wh）、積算出力電力量計測値（機器点逆方向 Wh）の搭載を必須とし、非搭載の値は無効値とする。また、受電点を制御ポイントとできる機器は積算系統買電電力量計測値(Wh)、積算系統売電電力量計測値(Wh)の搭載を推奨する。
note.en: It is mandatory to install the measured cumulative amount of input electric energy (normal direction at device point) (Wh) and the measured cumulative amount of output electric energy (reverse direction at device point) (Wh).In addition, it is recommended that devices that can use the power receiving point as a control point should be equipped with the measured cumulative amount of electric energy bought from grid (Wh) and the measured cumulative amount of electric energy sold to grid (Wh).

descriptions.ja: 周波数制御積算電力量計測値
descriptions.en: Cumulative electric energy measurement by frequency regulation

descriptions.ja: EM制御積算電力量計測値(Wh)
descriptions.en: Cumulative electric energy measurement by EM control (Wh)

descriptions.ja: 指令制御積算電力量計測値(Wh)
descriptions.en: Cumulative electric energy measurement by command control (Wh)

descriptions.ja: 自端制御積算電力量計測値(Wh)
descriptions.en: Cumulative electric energy measurement by autonomous control (Wh)
